title: Trace a Policy Through Government
description: Choose one Australian policy issue and map it from public problem through consultation, decision, delivery, and evaluation.
whyItMatters: This project forces you to stop treating policy as a headline and start seeing it as a sequence of institutions, tradeoffs, and bottlenecks.

steps.title: Pick a live issue
steps.description: Choose a current or recent Australian policy issue such as housing, energy, migration, or aged care.

steps.title: Map the cycle
steps.description: Write the issue framing, option generation, consultation, decision point, delivery path, and likely evaluation loop.

steps.title: Add the institutions
steps.description: Identify which ministers, departments, states, or committees matter most.

steps.title: Mark the bottleneck
steps.description: Highlight where the issue is most likely to stall, distort, or get watered down.

deliverables: One policy map on a single page
A short note on the main bottleneck and why it matters

rubric.description: Does the map reflect the real Australian process rather than a civics simplification?
Does it show actual constraints, not just preferred outcomes?
